bash_file_ops:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# File operations
if [ -f "{path}" ]; then
    echo "File exists: {path}"
    echo "Size: $(stat -f%z "{path}" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "{path}" 2>/dev/null)"
    echo "Lines: $(wc -l < "{path}")"
else
    echo "File not found: {path}"
    exit 1
fi
bash_text_process:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Text processing pipeline
cat "{path}" | \
    sed 's/[[:space:]]*$//' | \
    sort | \
    uniq -c | \
    sort -rn | \
    head -20
bash_sysadmin:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== System Information ==="
echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo "Uptime: $(uptime -p 2>/dev/null || uptime)"
echo "Kernel: $(uname -r)"
echo "CPU: $(nproc) cores"
echo "Memory: $(free -h 2>/dev/null | awk '/^Mem:/{print $3"/"$2}' || vm_stat | head -5)"
echo "Disk: $(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $3"/"$2" ("$5" used)"}')"
echo "Load: $(cat /proc/loadavg 2>/dev/null || sysctl -n vm.loadavg 2>/dev/null)"
bash_networking:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

HOST="{url}"
PORT="${PORT:-80}"

echo "=== Network Check: $HOST ==="
echo "DNS: $(dig +short "$HOST" 2>/dev/null || nslookup "$HOST" 2>/dev/null | tail -2)"
echo "Ping: $(ping -c 3 "$HOST" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)"
echo "Port $PORT: $(nc -zw3 "$HOST" "$PORT" 2>&1 && echo 'OPEN' || echo 'CLOSED')"
bash_process_mgmt:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Top Processes (by CPU) ==="
ps aux --sort=-%cpu 2>/dev/null | head -11 || ps aux | sort -nrk 3 | head -11

echo ""
echo "=== Top Processes (by Memory) ==="
ps aux --sort=-%mem 2>/dev/null | head -11 || ps aux | sort -nrk 4 | head -11
bash_string_ops:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

STR="{data}"

echo "Length: ${#STR}"
echo "Upper: ${STR^^}"
echo "Lower: ${STR,,}"
echo "First 10: ${STR:0:10}"
echo "Replace: ${STR//old/new}"
bash_array_ops:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Array operations
declare -a ARR=({data})

echo "Count: ${#ARR[@]}"
echo "First: ${ARR[0]}"
echo "Last: ${ARR[-1]}"
echo "All: ${ARR[*]}"

# Iterate
for item in "${ARR[@]}"; do
    echo "  - $item"
done
bash_conditionals:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

VALUE="{data}"

if [ -z "$VALUE" ]; then
    echo "Empty value"
elif [[ "$VALUE" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
    echo "Numeric: $VALUE"
elif [ -f "$VALUE" ]; then
    echo "File: $VALUE"
else
    echo "String: $VALUE"
fi
bash_loops:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Loop through files
for f in {path}/*; do
    [ -f "$f" ] || continue
    echo "Processing: $(basename "$f") ($(wc -c < "$f") bytes)"
done
bash_logging:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

LOG_FILE="{output_path}"
LOG_LEVEL="${LOG_LEVEL:-INFO}"

log() {
    local level="$1"; shift
    echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') [$level] $*" | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"
}

log INFO "Script started"
log DEBUG "Debug message"
log WARN "Warning message"
log ERROR "Error message"
bash_cron:
#!/bin/bash
# Cron job template
# Add to crontab: */5 * * * * /path/to/this_script.sh
set -euo pipefail

LOCK_FILE="/tmp/$(basename "$0").lock"
if [ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]; then
    PID=$(cat "$LOCK_FILE")
    if kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "Already running (PID: $PID)"
        exit 0
    fi
fi
echo $$ > "$LOCK_FILE"
trap 'rm -f "$LOCK_FILE"' EXIT

echo "Cron task running at $(date)"
bash_systemd:
[Unit]
Description={data}
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory={path}
ExecStart={path}/run.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
bash_disk_usage:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Disk Usage Report ==="
df -h | awk 'NR==1 || /^\/dev/'
echo ""
echo "=== Largest Directories ==="
du -sh {path}/* 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Files > 100MB ==="
find {path} -type f -size +100M -exec ls -lh {} \; 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5, $NF}'
bash_backup:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SOURCE="{path}"
BACKUP_DIR="{output_path}"
DATE=$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
ARCHIVE="$BACKUP_DIR/backup_$DATE.tar.gz"

mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
tar -czf "$ARCHIVE" -C "$(dirname "$SOURCE")" "$(basename "$SOURCE")"
echo "Backup created: $ARCHIVE ($(du -h "$ARCHIVE" | cut -f1))"
bash_ssh_auto:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

HOST="{url}"
USER="${USER:-root}"
KEY="${SSH_KEY:-~/.ssh/id_ed25519}"

ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i "$KEY" "$USER@$HOST" '{data}'
bash_firewall:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# UFW firewall setup
echo "Configuring firewall..."
ufw default deny incoming
ufw default allow outgoing
ufw allow ssh
ufw allow 80/tcp
ufw allow 443/tcp
echo "y" | ufw enable
ufw status verbose
bash_docker:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Docker Status ==="
docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}'
echo ""
echo "=== Images ==="
docker images --format 'table {{.Repository}}\t{{.Tag}}\t{{.Size}}'
echo ""
echo "=== Disk Usage ==="
docker system df
bash_git_auto:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

cd "{path}"
echo "=== Git Status ==="
git status --short
echo ""
echo "=== Recent Commits ==="
git log --oneline -10
echo ""
echo "=== Branches ==="
git branch -a
bash_curl_api:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

URL="{url}"
RESPONSE=$(curl -sS -w '\n%{http_code}' "$URL")
HTTP_CODE=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | tail -1)
BODY=$(echo "$RESPONSE" | sed '$d')

echo "Status: $HTTP_CODE"
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "$BODY" | jq .
else
    echo "$BODY"
fi
bash_json_parse:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

JSON_FILE="{path}"

if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Keys: $(jq -r 'keys[]' "$JSON_FILE" 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ')"
    echo "Pretty:"
    jq . "$JSON_FILE"
else
    python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps(json.load(open('$JSON_FILE')),indent=2))"
fi
bash_find_files:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SEARCH_DIR="{path}"
PATTERN="{data}"

echo "=== Files matching: $PATTERN ==="
find "$SEARCH_DIR" -type f -name "$PATTERN" -print0 | \
    while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
        echo "$(stat -f'%z' "$file" 2>/dev/null || stat -c'%s' "$file" 2>/dev/null) $file"
    done | sort -rn | head -20
bash_grep_search:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SEARCH_DIR="{path}"
PATTERN="{data}"

echo "=== Searching for: $PATTERN ==="
grep -rn --color=auto "$PATTERN" "$SEARCH_DIR" 2>/dev/null | head -50
bash_sed_replace:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

FILE="{path}"
OLD="{data}"
NEW="{output_path}"

echo "Replacing '$OLD' with '$NEW' in $FILE"
if [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then
    sed -i '' "s/$OLD/$NEW/g" "$FILE"
else
    sed -i "s/$OLD/$NEW/g" "$FILE"
fi
echo "Done. Changes:"
grep -n "$NEW" "$FILE" | head -10
bash_compress:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SOURCE="{path}"
OUTPUT="{output_path}"

if [ -d "$SOURCE" ]; then
    tar -czf "$OUTPUT" -C "$(dirname "$SOURCE")" "$(basename "$SOURCE")"
else
    gzip -c "$SOURCE" > "$OUTPUT"
fi
echo "Compressed: $(du -h "$OUTPUT" | cut -f1)"
bash_env_vars:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Load .env file
if [ -f .env ]; then
    set -a
    source .env
    set +a
    echo "Loaded .env"
fi

# Required vars check
REQUIRED=("DB_HOST" "DB_PORT" "API_KEY")
for var in "${REQUIRED[@]}"; do
    if [ -z "${!var:-}" ]; then
        echo "Missing: $var" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done
echo "All required vars present"
bash_health_check:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SERVICES=({data})
FAILED=0

for svc in "${SERVICES[@]}"; do
    if systemctl is-active --quiet "$svc" 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "[OK] $svc"
    else
        echo "[FAIL] $svc" >&2
        FAILED=$((FAILED+1))
    fi
done

if [ $FAILED -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "$FAILED service(s) down" >&2
    exit 1
fi
echo "All services healthy"
bash_monitoring:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

INTERVAL=${1:-5}
OUTPUT="{output_path}"

while true; do
    TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
    CPU=$(top -bn1 2>/dev/null | grep 'Cpu' | awk '{print $2}' || echo 'N/A')
    MEM=$(free -m 2>/dev/null | awk '/^Mem:/{printf "%.1f%%", $3/$2*100}' || echo 'N/A')
    DISK=$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $5}')
    echo "$TIMESTAMP CPU=$CPU MEM=$MEM DISK=$DISK" | tee -a "$OUTPUT"
    sleep "$INTERVAL"
done
bash_db_backup:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

DB_PATH="{path}"
BACKUP_DIR="{output_path}"
DATE=$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')

mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

if command -v sqlite3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && file "$DB_PATH" | grep -q SQLite; then
    sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" "VACUUM INTO '$BACKUP_DIR/db_$DATE.sqlite3'"
elif command -v pg_dump >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    pg_dump -Fc > "$BACKUP_DIR/db_$DATE.dump"
elif command -v mysqldump >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    mysqldump --all-databases > "$BACKUP_DIR/db_$DATE.sql"
fi
echo "Backup complete: $BACKUP_DIR/db_$DATE.*"
bash_deploy:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

APP_DIR="{path}"
SERVICE="{data}"

echo "=== Deploying $SERVICE ==="
cd "$APP_DIR"
git pull origin main
pip install -r requirements.txt -q 2>/dev/null || true
systemctl restart "$SERVICE"
sleep 2
if systemctl is-active --quiet "$SERVICE"; then
    echo "Deploy successful"
else
    echo "Deploy FAILED" >&2
    systemctl status "$SERVICE" --no-pager
    exit 1
fi
bash_cleanup:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Cleanup ==="
echo "Before: $(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $4}') free"

# Temp files older than 7 days
find /tmp -type f -mtime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null || true

# Old logs
find /var/log -name '*.gz' -mtime +30 -delete 2>/dev/null || true

# Docker cleanup
docker system prune -f 2>/dev/null || true

# Package cache
apt-get clean 2>/dev/null || true

echo "After: $(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $4}') free"
